message:
🐛 Register compliance hooks with mode transition system (#2947) (#2976)

When switching from demo to AI/live mode, useKubescape, useTrivy, and
useTrestle did not register with the mode transition coordinator, so
their cached demo data persisted until page refresh. Add clearCache,
registerCacheReset, and registerRefetch to each hook, matching the
existing pattern in useKyverno.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
